title: Picture Brides
writer: Adele Buffington, Will Ahern, Charles E. Blaney
actors: Dorothy Mackaill, Regis Toomey, Dorothy Libaire
plot: Four "Picture Brides" from New Orleans arrive in the Brazilian jungle on a riverboat, brought there to marry workers at Lottagrasso, a remote mining site of the Standard Diamond Mines. On the same boat with the "mail-order" brides...
